title: Vanilla Beta
description: Vanilla version of Minecraft, but with old Beta 1.7.3 aesthetics
body:
**This modpack allows you to experience old Beta Minecraft aesthetic, with content from new versions**

### Changes:
- Disabled hunger
- Experience shown as text in top right corner, instead of bar
- Old combat mechanics
- Old textures, and beta styled textures for new items/blocks
- Disabled sprint *(fast swim still works)*
- Old sounds
- Old music
- Old explosion particles
- Old lighting *(for example nether will be dark)*
- And many more!

### Also recommend you to enable "bundle" datapack when creating new world
